name: Cannellini Beans with Rosemary and Garlic
description: Fresh rosemary plays off of the rich, deep flavor of the beans and miso to create a hearty and satisfying side dish.
instructions: Cook beans according to package directions and reserve in a bowl.
Heat oil in a small sauce pan.
Sauté the onion lightly in the olive oil over medium heat until the onions are soft and translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and rosemary to pan and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add reserved beans and white miso to the pan, stir well to combine, and cook until boiling, about 2 to 3 minutes.
Add white wine to pan, stir well, reduce heat, and simmer until liquid has cooked down, about 5 to 10 minutes.
Add salt and pepper, taste, and adjust seasonings accordingly before serving.
